note: Because a standardized global definition is used instead of national administrative ones, the figures may differ from those reported by countries.
title: Population density of the world's largest cities
subtitle: The number of people per km² of land area for cities ranked among the top 100 most populous in 2020. [Cities](#dod:cities-degurba) are identified using satellite imagery and population data, applying the same density and size thresholds across all countries.
